message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-supply-chain-gate): pin SupplyChainGateConfig defaults + SupplyChainGate cache management contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-skxwf)

13 tests pinning the host's connector-install-time supply-chain
gate. Zero prior coverage despite this being a security-critical
gate.

- SupplyChainGateConfig::default 3 documented values:
  - cache_capacity = 256 (256-entry result cache)
  - allow_dev_overrides = false (production safety — dev overrides
    MUST require explicit opt-in)
  - policy = SupplyChainVerificationPolicy::default() (fail-closed)
- SupplyChainGate::new() and with_config(default()) yield equivalent
  starting state with cache_size=0 (no leakage between fresh gates)
- clear_cache() on empty gate is no-op + idempotent (safe to call
  repeatedly without panic)
- policy() returns borrowed reference
- Edge cases: 0-capacity cache + 1M-capacity cache both construct
  without panic
- Spread-update via ..default() preserves documented cache_capacity
- Clone preserves all 3 fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
